title: 2026 Oscars Winners Summary
text: One Battle After Another was the big winner of the 98th Academy Awards, taking home six Oscars. Director Paul Thomas Anderson's film secured Best Picture, Best Director, Best Adapted Screenplay, Best Supporting Actor, Best Film Editing, and Best Casting. In the Best Supporting Actor category, Sean Penn won for his performance in One Battle After Another. The film Sinners emerged as the second-biggest winner, claiming four awards. Michael B Jordan earned Best Actor honors, while cinematographer Autumn Durald Arkapaw won for Best Cinematography. Director Ryan Coogler received his first Oscar for Best Original Screenplay, and Ludwig Göransson won Best Original Score. Other notable acting winners included Jessie Buckley as Best Actress for Hamnet and Amy Madigan as Best Supporting Actress for Weapons. The South Korean animated feature KPop Demon Hunters and Frankenstein each secured two awards. Avatar: Fire and Ash won Best Visual Effects, while Mr Nobody Against Putin took Best Documentary Feature.
